offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 safety certifications/month, missed renewals cause compliance penalties. We provide a tracking tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling certification renewals for safety officers.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums sharing tools for contractors
try_it: Let users try manual entry for certification details and simple dashboard for tracking certification status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
